name: memoriant-architecture-review-skill
description: Structured AI-assisted architecture reviews — accepts a brief, produces narrative summary, risk table, tradeoffs, questions, checklist, and evidence log entry.
author: Nathan Maine

skills.name: architecture-review
skills.description: Conduct a structured architecture review from a YAML brief or inline description, producing risks, tradeoffs, questions, checklist, and an evidence log entry.

agents.name: architecture-review-agent
agents.description: Autonomous agent that conducts structured architecture reviews from briefs and maintains an evidence audit log.
